name: qianxin-fw-secgate3600-http-x
description: OctoBus package for the QIANXIN SecGate3600 WebUI HTTP_X login and blacklist APIs.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_HTTP_X.QIANXIN_FW.name: login
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_HTTP_X.QIANXIN_FW.description: Call the SecGate3600 WebUI login API.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_HTTP_X.QIANXIN_FW.name: block-ip
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_HTTP_X.QIANXIN_FW.description: Add an IP address to the WebUI blacklist.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_HTTP_X.QIANXIN_FW.name: unblock-ip
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600_HTTP_X.QIANXIN_FW.description: Remove an IP address from the WebUI blacklist.
